wwe2k23 era mode

I'm sorry, but there is currently no such game as WWE 2K23. The latest game in the WWE 2K series is WWE 2K20, which was released in 2019. However, if a WWE 2K23 game were to be released in the future, it is possible that it could feature an era mode similar to past WWE 2K games. These modes typically allow players to relive and play through significant periods in WWE history, with relevant wrestlers, events, and championships from those eras.
wwe2k20 era mode

WWE 2K20 features a Showcase Mode, which is the closest equivalent to an era mode in the game. This mode lets players relive the Women's Evolution of WWE, which covers the time span from the inaugural WWE Women's Championship match at WrestleMania 22 to the first-ever women's main event at WrestleMania 35. In Showcase Mode, players can follow the journeys of WWE Superstars like Charlotte Flair, Sasha Banks, Bayley, and Becky Lynch, as they rise through the ranks and make history in WWE. The mode features authentic footage and audio from the time period, as well as unlockable characters, arenas, and championship titles.
wwe 2k24 showcase mode

As of August 2021, there has been no official announcement for WWE 2K24. WWE 2K games typically include showcase modes that allow players to relive and play through some of the most iconic moments in WWE history, complete with authentically recreated arenas, championships, and wrestlers. It's impossible to predict what specific showcase mode could be included in a hypothetical WWE 2K24 game, but fans can expect it to have an impressive selection of past events and top wrestlers.

what if tim duncan was drafted by the knicks

If Tim Duncan was drafted by the Knicks during his rookie season, it is likely that the Knicks would have enjoyed significantly more success in the years to come. When Duncan was drafted in 1997, the Knicks were a perennial playoff team but had not won a championship since 1973. 

As one of the best players to ever play the game, Duncan's presence would have immediately given the Knicks one of the league's most dominant big men. Alongside Patrick Ewing, the Knicks could have formed a dynamic frontcourt that few teams would have been able to match up against. This would have improved the team's chances of making deep playoff runs and potentially winning a championship.

It is possible that having a player of Duncan's caliber could have also influenced the trajectory of other players' careers, as they would have been able to learn from his work ethic and leadership skills. However, it is important to note that basketball is a team sport, and a single player can only do so much to influence a team's success. Many other factors, such as team chemistry and coaching, also play a significant role in a team's performance.

Overall, while we can never know for certain how Duncan's career would have panned out had he been drafted by the Knicks, it is clear that his presence on the team would have dramatically changed the course of the franchise's history.
whats the most watched programs in tv history

It's difficult to determine the most watched programs in TV history due to the vast number of channels, shows, and viewing methods available. However, here are some of the most watched TV programs or events worldwide, according to various sources:

1. M*A*S*H finale in 1983, which was watched by an estimated 106 million people in the US
2. FIFA World Cup, including the 2018 final between France and Croatia, which drew an estimated 1.1 billion viewers 
3. Super Bowl XLIX in 2015, which had an estimated 114.4 million viewers in the US 
4. UEFA Champions League Final, with viewership varying each year but can reach up to over 350 million viewers worldwide
5. Beijing Olympic Games opening ceremony in 2008 was estimated to have 1 billion viewers worldwide 

It's worth noting that these figures are based on estimated live TV audience figures and do not account for digital or delayed viewing. Additionally, there may be other programs that have reached similar or greater audiences depending on geographic location and reporting standards.
whats the most watched even in tv history

The most watched event in TV history varies depending on the criteria used for measurement, but one of the most widely cited events is the 1969 Apollo 11 moon landing. An estimated 530 million people worldwide watched the historic event on television as astronaut Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on the moon. The broadcast was carried by networks all over the world, making it one of the most widely televised events in history. 

Other events that are often cited as having very large TV audiences include the 2018 FIFA World Cup Final, Princess Diana's funeral in 1997, and the funeral for Pope John Paul II in 2005. The specific viewership numbers for these events can vary depending on the source, but they are generally considered to be some of the largest audiences in TV history.
what if the undertakers streak was broken by randy orton

The Undertaker's WrestleMania streak was widely regarded as one of the most significant accomplishments in professional wrestling history. If Randy Orton would have broken this streak, it would have been a shocking moment that could have dramatically altered the course of The Undertaker's career and the WWE as a whole.

Firstly, breaking The Undertaker's WrestleMania streak would have solidified Randy Orton as a top performer in WWE. It would have given him immediate credibility as one of the most elite wrestlers to ever set foot in the ring. However, it would also have put immense pressure on him to sustain this level of success for the remainder of his career.

As for The Undertaker, breaking his WrestleMania streak would have been a significant blow to his legacy. However, many fans would likely still consider him one of the greatest wrestlers of all time due to his years in the business and the numerous titles and accolades he has won. Nevertheless, it could have potentially led to his retirement following this loss, making it a bittersweet ending to his legendary career.

The WWE itself would also have been affected by the shock and backlash from breaking the streak. Fans may have been outraged by the decision, leading to a decline in ratings and a loss of trust between the company and its audience. This backlash may have also impacted Orton's career, as he was responsible for ending such a significant part of WWE history.

Overall, if Randy Orton would have broken The Undertaker's WrestleMania streak, it would have been one of the most shocking moments in WWE history, with potential huge consequences for the company, both in terms of storyline and fan reactions.
book a impact invasion of wwe in 2023

It's important to note that it's impossible to predict what will happen in the world of professional wrestling, as storylines change on a frequent basis. That being said, here is a potential way to book an Impact/ TNA invasion of WWE in 2023:

- The storyline could begin with a cryptic video message on WWE programming from a mysterious figure claiming to be the new owner of Impact Wrestling. This person could say that they are tired of WWE's monopoly on the industry and that they are coming to take what is theirs.

- The invasion could begin with a surprise attack on a WWE pay-per-view event or Monday Night RAW, with some of the top stars from Impact showing up unannounced to assault WWE wrestlers and disrupt the show. The attackers could be led by a new version of Aces & Eights, a former top faction in Impact Wrestling, who could state that they are here to "take over" WWE.

- As the weeks go by, the Invasion storyline could intensify and lead to more attacks and retaliation from both sides. The wrestlers on both brands could engage in intense battles and confrontations, building towards a pay-per-view event that would feature a WarGames match between teams from both sides.

- In the buildup to the WarGames match, several wrestlers could switch allegiances, adding an element of unpredictability to the storyline. This could include a wrestler from the WWE betraying the company to join the invaders, or an Impact wrestler defecting to the other side.

- The WarGames match itself could be a brutal affair, with weapons and high-risk moves used throughout. The two sides would fight tooth and nail, with the fate of each company hanging in the balance.

- In the end, the invading team could emerge victorious, signaling a new era in the world of professional wrestling. The storyline could continue for some time after the WarGames match, leading to new alliances, storylines and feuds between wrestlers from both brands.

Overall, an Impact invasion of WWE in 2023 could be an epic and exciting storyline, if executed properly. Fans would be on the edge of their seats with anticipation and excitement as two of the biggest brands in professional wrestling collide in a battle for supremacy.
